_comment: Thresholds for iOS Simulator Release perf guard. Metrics: tokensStartMs (Home:refresh:start:tokens timestamp), tokensSpanMs (done-start), functionCallCount (#lines in function_call.log). Values are absolute; trigger when median > threshold (strategy=median).
_baseline_note: Computed from sample sessions perf-mkjvz2xa-tnxkdj / perf-mkjvzdgv-bvv5ty / perf-mkjvzo1r-vmh1a8 with +10% tolerance.
